ticket.subject: SSO certificate expired overnight
ticket.body: Our SSO certificate expired and employees are redirected back to the identity provider. Nobody can reach the workspace admin page.

notes: Blocked SSO access for an enterprise account.

ticket.subject: Invite link question
ticket.body: A teammate says their invite link is confusing. They can still sign in, but want to know if we can send a cleaner invite email.

notes: Account access support wording without a blocking issue.

ticket.subject: Manager keeps seeing MFA prompt
ticket.body: One manager is asked for MFA every time they open the app. They can eventually sign in after several attempts.

notes: Single-user friction with a workaround.

ticket.subject: Invoice PDF button question
ticket.body: The Download PDF button for invoice INV-4021 is hard to find. Can billing send the invoice copy directly?

notes: Billing request with UI wording but no product bug.

ticket.subject: Refund disputed renewal
ticket.body: Finance disputes the renewal charge because the account was supposed to be downgraded. Please issue a refund or credit.

notes: Billing-sensitive dispute with refund and credit language.

ticket.subject: Plan downgrade timing
ticket.body: We want to downgrade from premium to standard at the next renewal. What happens to the subscription features?

notes: Subscription plan question without refund, cancellation, or dispute.

ticket.subject: Dashboard totals changed
ticket.body: The dashboard total says 418 open tickets, but the filtered list only shows 391. Finance noticed the mismatch this morning.

notes: Understated data correctness issue with finance impact.

ticket.subject: Mobile layout overlaps
ticket.body: On a small phone screen, the export icon overlaps the date selector. The page still works if I rotate the phone.

notes: Low-impact UI bug with a workaround.

ticket.subject: API returns 409 for valid payload
ticket.body: Our integration gets a 409 conflict for a documented create request. The same payload worked last week.

notes: API product behavior appears broken, not a setup question.

ticket.subject: Search feels slow
ticket.body: Search is a little slow for one analyst when filtering old records. Results still load after a few seconds.

notes: Low-impact performance complaint.

ticket.subject: All users see gateway timeout
ticket.body: Every user in our workspace gets a 504 gateway timeout when opening the dashboard.

notes: Broad availability issue with all users blocked from dashboard access.

ticket.subject: Large report times out for one user
ticket.body: A single analyst gets a timeout on one large report. Everyone else can open smaller reports normally.

notes: Availability signal is limited but still worth review as a potential incident.

ticket.subject: Export configuration help
ticket.body: How do we configure scheduled exports so each department receives a separate CSV file?

notes: Configuration support request that mentions export.

ticket.subject: Webhook and API setup
ticket.body: We need help setting up the webhook endpoint and rotating the API key for our test workspace.

notes: Integration setup without product failure.

ticket.subject: Import mapping question
ticket.body: During import setup, which field type should we use for a multi-select owner list?

notes: Import setup question, not an import failure.

ticket.subject: Report may include another customer's rows
ticket.body: This might be nothing, but one export appears to show rows with another customer's account name.

notes: Understated cross-customer data exposure concern.

ticket.subject: DPA retention question
ticket.body: Our compliance team wants to confirm retention behavior for archived users under the DPA.

notes: Privacy-sensitive policy question without incident language.

ticket.subject: Disabled contractor still appears active
ticket.body: A contractor account we disabled yesterday still appears active in the audit log and may have opened a report.

notes: Possible access-control issue with a disabled account.

ticket.subject: API export enhancement
ticket.body: We would like the API export to include custom labels. This is not blocking our current integration.

notes: Feature request mentioning API and export terms.

ticket.subject: Import template suggestion
ticket.body: It would be helpful if import templates could be saved and reused across teams.

notes: Enhancement request that mentions import but is not support troubleshooting.

ticket.subject: URGENT brand colors
ticket.body: URGENT for a presentation: can we customize chart colors to match our brand? The default colors still work.

notes: Emotional urgency with low actual product impact.

ticket.subject: Checking on last week's thing
ticket.body: Can you look at the thing from last week again? I do not have the details in front of me.

notes: Missing prior context and no actionable detail.

ticket.subject: Login, invoice, and dashboard problem
ticket.body: Something is wrong with login, an invoice, and the dashboard, but I need to collect screenshots before explaining.

notes: Mixed-intent vague complaint should not be forced into one category.

ticket.subject: Extremely urgent
ticket.body: This is extremely urgent and someone needs to fix it now. I cannot share more details yet.

notes: Emotional urgency without actionable content.
